name: Scallops Mornay
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water or chicken broth to boiling in a large saucepan.
2. Add asparagus and heat until boiling. Reduce the heat, then simmer uncovered for about 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender-crisp. Drain.
3. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in the same saucepan over medium-high heat. Cook scallops in the butter for 3-5 minutes, stirring frequently, until they are white. Remove scallops from the pan and drain any liquid from it.
4. Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon butter in the same saucepan. Stir in flour and tarragon. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until smooth and bubbly. Turn off the heat.
5. Stir in broth. Heat until boiling; stir constantly. Boil for 1 minute.
6. Stir in cheese until just melted.
7. Stir in scallops, asparagus, and sherry. Heat until hot (not boiling). Serve over fettuccine.
